title: Amtech G0992 300mm (12") Decorator's edge
features: LIGHTWEIGHT AND DURABLE: This 300cm (12") decorator's edge has a lightweight handle and a durable steel rule with both imperial and metric measurements
VERSATILE: The all-purpose trimming edge ensures straight edges when cutting wallcoverings
SIZE CAPACITY: 12 inch / 30 cm / 300 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 30cm DECORATORS EDGE See more
